data.description: Sell e-books, PDFs, guides, and digital products online in Uganda, Kenya, Tanzania, and Rwanda. Free to join. Pesapal payments. Instant file delivery. Pay only 10% when you sell.

East African creator commerce

Sell E-books Online. Keep 90% of Every Sale.

Create your store, upload your products, and get paid via mobile money. No monthly fees. No technical skills required.

What you get when you sell on Keevan Store

Every tool an East African creator needs to sell digital products directly to customers.

Your own branded store

Every author gets a personalized store URL and shareable product links. No website builder required.

No buyer accounts needed

Customers pay through Pesapal and download instantly. No sign-up friction means more sales.

Pesapal payments in your currency

Buyers pay with mobile money, card, or bank transfer in UGX, KES, TZS, RWF, or USD. Keevan Store verifies every transaction server-side.

Instant file delivery

After payment verification, customers get a signed download link. Files arrive seconds after purchase.

Sales and revenue analytics

Track views, purchases, download counts, and earnings in your dashboard. Know exactly what sells.

Multiple file formats

Upload PDF, EPUB, MOBI, or ZIP files up to 4 MB. Customers download in their preferred format.

Protected file storage

Files are stored securely with signed download URLs and server-side payment verification. No leaks.

Withdrawal to mobile money

Request withdrawals directly to your MTN or Airtel Money account. Minimum thresholds start at 50,000 UGX.

Trusted by creators across East Africa

50+

Active creators selling digital products

5,000+

Digital products delivered to buyers

UGX, KES, TZS, RWF, USD

Multi-currency support for any market

How selling on Keevan Store works

From upload to payout in four steps.

Step 1

Sign up free

Create your creator account. No credit card. No monthly fee.

Step 2

Upload your product

Add a PDF, EPUB, MOBI, or ZIP file. Set your price in UGX, KES, TZS, RWF, or USD.

Step 3

Share your store

Your branded store link goes live immediately. Share it anywhere.

Step 4

Get paid

Keevan Store collects payments. You keep 90%. Request withdrawal anytime.

Start selling in 10 minutes

Ready to start selling your digital products?

Join East African creators already using Keevan Store. Free to start. Pay only when you sell.

Create Your Free Store

Frequently asked questions about selling e-books online

Honest answers about how Keevan Store works for creators.

How much does Keevan Store cost?

Keevan Store charges zero monthly fees. The only cost is a 10% platform commission deducted when a product sells. If you do not make a sale, you pay nothing. Withdrawals to your mobile money or bank account are free.

Who can sell on Keevan Store?

Any East African creator who owns the rights to their digital content. Authors, educators, coaches, template designers, and course creators all use Keevan Store. We currently serve Uganda, Kenya, Tanzania, and Rwanda.

What file formats can I upload?

You can upload PDF, EPUB, MOBI, and ZIP files up to 4 MB. These cover e-books, guides, templates, worksheets, and bundled resources.

How do payments work?

Keevan Store uses Pesapal, East Africa's leading payment gateway. Buyers pay via mobile money (MTN, Airtel), debit or credit card, or bank transfer in the store's currency (UGX, KES, TZS, RWF, or USD).

When and how do I get paid?

Earnings accumulate in your creator dashboard. Once your balance reaches the minimum withdrawal threshold for your currency, you can request a payout. Minimums are 50,000 UGX, 1,500 KES, 30,000 TZS, 20,000 RWF, or 20 USD. Platform administrators review and process payouts manually.

Do I need technical skills to set up my store?

No. Sign up, upload your product, and your store is live. There is no coding, no design work, and no hosting setup required.

Can I edit my product after publishing?

Yes. Your creator dashboard lets you update product titles, descriptions, prices, and files anytime.

What if someone buys my product and wants a refund?

Because digital products are delivered instantly, refunds are handled case by case. Contact support if there is an issue with delivery or payment.

View all FAQ

Keevan Store

Creator commerce for East African authors, educators, and digital creators. Sell e-books, guides, templates, and digital products directly to your audience.
